  s(t) (metres)  

at time t (seconds) from t = 2 to t = 2 + h is  

  v̅ = [s(2 + h) − s(2)] / [(2 + h) − 2].

s(2) = (1/3)(2) + 5 = 2/3 + 5 = 17/3.

v̅(h) = [s(2 + h) − s(2)]/h  
    = [(17/3 + (1/3)h) − 17/3]/h  
    = (1/3)h / h
